Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, it is designed to capture light from every angle, making it an exceptional choice for any special occasion or a cherished addition to your jewelry collection.

name: Diamond Tie Necklace
description: This is a stunning strand of diamonds that would compliment absolutely any ensemble..highlight a lovely blouse or blazer with this on the neckline and you'll definitely turn heads..or make this the focal point of a fabulous strapless dress. description: This is a piece that combines timeless elegance with a dash of whimsy! Available in 3 diamond combinations, with total diamond weights of 4, 5 or 7 carats . you won't want to miss this one!

An excellent addition to your jewelry wardrobe!

name: Diamond Flower Choker
description: Make a statement with this unique choker, which features a cascading flower shaped design. Each flower is perfectly set with sparkling diamonds to create a luxurious look. Available in your choice of yellow or white gold.
